rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JOHN RIERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Service Of Process To Remove Lien From Property Through Secretary Of State
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 05, 2020 line 1. PETITIONERs JOHN RIERA and LAURA RIERA's Motion For Service Of Process To Remove Lien From Property Through Secretary Of State is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per California Code of Civil Procedure sections 1005 and 1013, and moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7(B). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL VS. MAXIMUS 620 OWNER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 05, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFFs MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP and EJC FOLSOM LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication is CONTINUED to February 10, 2020 for Plaintiffs to comply with Local Rule 2.7(B). Plaintiffs must provide the Court with courtesy copies of its Reply papers no later than February 5, 2020 at 12:00 PM. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELO CIBRIAN VS. DANA PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Expunging Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 05, 2020 line 3. MICHAEL PECHERER, ESQ (REFEREE) Motion For Order Expunging Lis Pendens is OFF CALENDAR. On January 24, 2020, Plaintiff recorded a withdrawal of Lis Pendens. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VERNA BERRY ET AL VS. VANESSA MEANS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Depositions Of Defendants Vanessa Means And Brett Means, For Order Requiring Vanessa Means And Brett Means To Produce Documents At Deposition, And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 05, 2020 line 4. PLAINTIFFs VERNA BERRY and BILLY ENNIS's Motion To Compel Depositions Of Defendants Vanessa Means And Brett Means, For Order Requiring Vanessa Means And Brett Means To Produce Documents At Deposition, And For Sanctions is CONTINUED to February 24, 2020, to be heard at 9:00 a.m. in Department 302. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. LATRICE DANIELS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 05, 2020 line 5. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement is OFF CALENDAR per letter from the moving party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. LATRICE DANIELS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Petition; Petition For Relief From Forfeiture; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Of Petition For Relief From Forfetiture
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 05, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT LATRICE DANIELS's Petition For Relief From Forfetiture Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. GREGORY WASHINGTON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 05, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT GREGORY WASHINGTON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, Plaintiff states facts sufficient to support a cause of action. = (501/CFH)
